thoughts_bootstrapcommand__clijs_8113648.content: `parseProviderModel` requires the `provider/model` format and throws on bare model names like `MiniMax-M1` — needs a guard or format normalization upstream.

thoughts_parseprovidermodel_utility_8113.content: `parseProviderModel` throws (not a graceful error) when the model string doesn't match `provider/model` — callers must handle this.

facts_cli_argument_passthrough_811367688.content: CLI handlers can silently drop flags not explicitly forwarded to sub-commands — always audit the options object passed to the inner command.

facts_kodyadeengine_dist_patching_811368.content: The fix targets `dist/bin/cli.js` (the published build) rather than source, so no TypeScript source changes are needed — a valid approach for hotfixing published packages.

conventions_model_string_format_81137039.content: Bare model names without a provider prefix are not supported — the codebase expects `provider/model` format from CLI input.
